feedback: APPROVE. Plan is comprehensive and well-structured: 16 tasks (0.5-4h each), full acceptance criteria, dependency graph, critical path (14 tasks, ~30.6h buffered), parallel schedule, risk register (12 risks), and complete TDD/FR-to-task coverage map. Referenced files (tests/cli/test-safety-cli.test.ts, src/cli/commands/cancel-action.ts) exist under plugins/autonomous-dev-homelab/ consistent with TDD path convention. Safety model preservation (MutationBarrier) and evidence redaction requirements are called out. Ready for spec phase.

findings.message: Task file paths are written relative to plugins/autonomous-dev-homelab/ (implicit plugin working directory), matching TDD convention; downstream agents must run from that dir.

artifacts.title: Plan reviewed: REQ-000055 Live Homelab End-to-End Enablement
